description_long: This is a modern, two-seater sofa with a deep, rich burgundy upholstery and a sleek, minimalist design. The sofa features two large, uniform seat cushions and two matching backrest cushions, all of which appear to be firmly attached and well-padded for comfort. The armrests are straight, low, and slightly flared, seamlessly integrated into the sofa's rectangular profile, giving it a contemporary look. The legs are short, metallic, and angled outward, positioned at each corner for stability and a touch of industrial style. The upholstery is smooth and solid in color, with no visible patterns or decorative stitching, contributing to its clean and elegant appearance. This sofa would be well-suited for urban environments such as lobbies, waiting areas, or modern outdoor lounges.
description: A sleek, modern burgundy two-seater sofa with smooth upholstery, low flared armrests, and metallic corner legs. The design is minimalist and elegant, ideal for contemporary urban settings.
description_view_0: Front view showing two large seat and back cushions, low flared armrests, and metallic legs at the corners.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the sofa's depth, thick seat and back cushions, and the straight profile of the armrest.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous backrest and the clean, uninterrupted lines of the sofa's back.
description_view_3: Right side view mirroring the left, showing the sofa's depth, cushion thickness, and armrest profile.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two large, uniform seat cushions and two matching backrest cushions, all attached and evenly spaced.
attribute_armrest_style: Low, straight, and slightly flared armrests integrated into the sofa's rectangular profile, with minimal padding and no decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Four short, outward-angled metallic legs positioned at each corner, with a sleek, exposed finish.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, straight, continuous backrest with two attached, uniform cushions and no visible tufting or segmentation.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid burgundy color with a smooth, matte texture and no visible patterns or decorative stitching.
